headline: Software Engineer | Java • C++ • Python • Kubernetes • AWS | Secret Clearance
summary: Software engineer with hands-on experience building safety-critical control systems. At a major entertainment company, I developed real-time software for ride control systems using PLCs, VFDs - including hardware integration on a large attraction project. Currently building distributed simulation infrastructure for defense programs. Interested in autonomous systems, robotics, and mission-critical software.

experience.description: Architected hardware-in-the-loop (HWIL) simulation software in Java/C++ for cyber range environments, enabling real-time emulation of distributed networked systems with strict timing constraints; directly analogous to functional model development for silicon architecture evaluation. Applied OOP design principles to build modular, extensible simulation components; designed RESTful APIs for resource allocation and built GitLab CI/CD pipelines with automated testing and compliance validation. Produced detailed software specifications, design documents, and test plans to defense standards, supporting system integration reviews across a large-scale distributed codebase.

Developed safety-critical control system software for theme park attractions, ensuring strict reliability and fault tolerance under real-time operating constraints. Programmed and tested PLC logic using Allen Bradley controllers and RSLogix 5000 for ride sequencing, safety interlocks, and E-stop handling. Integrated VFD motor controls and configured communication protocols between PLCs and field devices. Performed hands-on hardware integration and commissioning work on a large attraction project, including wiring, I/O verification, and system checkout.
